body.input:
Content: DOC: Lab API2. Lab API User Guide
We have re-worked the Pega Labs scripts to allow some of the Self-Service portal operations to be performed via API calls. We also provide scripts in /home/teuser/scripts that call the API and can be used as examples.

Before you begin:

All scripts are located in the /home/teuser/scripts directory.

All script must be executed as teuser

Scripts will make API calls and wait, and some operations may take a while, so you might want to use tmux to start a session you can reattach to in case you lose connection.

You won't see progress while running the script, but you can watch logs in /var/log/pegalabs/portal in a separate session if you want to.

When the script finishes, a success or failure email will be sent to the emails associated with the system.

Please refer to the SSH Guide for SSH connection information.
